author: rsteckler
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Sync your Cordari voice-recording summaries, transcripts, and audio into your vault.

manifest.description: Sync your Cordari voice recordings and handwritten notes into your vault.

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix(notes): repoint Obsidian notes sync to /api/boox-notes + fail-soft lane (COR-352) by @rsteckler in https://github.com/Radiant-Maple-Studios/cordari-obsidian/pull/5


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Radiant-Maple-Studios/cordari-obsidian/compare/0.1.4...0.1.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* docs(readme): drop "(once listed)" — Cordari is in Community Plugins by @rsteckler in https://github.com/Radiant-Maple-Studios/cordari-obsidian/pull/1
* docs(readme): point Support link to cordari-obsidian repo (COR-134) by @rsteckler in https://github.com/Radiant-Maple-Studios/cordari-obsidian/pull/2
* feat(notes): sync handwritten notes from /api/v1/notes (COR-319 PR 8b) by @rsteckler in https://github.com/Radiant-Maple-Studios/cordari-obsidian/pull/3
* ci(release): automate Obsidian plugin releases on tag push (COR-343) by @rsteckler in https://github.com/Radiant-Maple-Studios/cordari-obsidian/pull/4

## New Contributors
* @rsteckler made their first contribution in https://github.com/Radiant-Maple-Studios/cordari-obsidian/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Radiant-Maple-Studios/cordari-obsidian/compare/0.1.2...0.1.4
